name: Air It Out
description: Deploy an Air Support Charge in a Mission

name: Builder's Touch
description: Claim an item from your Foundry

name: Confiscated
description: Hijack a Crewship from the enemy

name: Deep Impact
description: Suspend 5 or more enemies in the air at once with a Heavy Slam Melee Attack

name: Grafitti
description: Deploy a Glyph while on a mission

name: Hands Full
description: Complete a Mission with only a Primary Weapon equipped

name: Liquidation
description: Sell any item in your Inventory for Credits

name: Loyalty
description: Interact with your Kubrow or Kavat

name: Mow Them Down
description: Kill 150 Enemies with a Primary Weapon

name: Sidearm
description: Complete a Mission with only a Secondary Weapon equipped

name: Smaller is Bigger
description: Kill 150 Enemies with a Secondary Weapon

name: Swatter
description: Kill 3 Drones or Ospreys with your Melee Weapon

name: Sword Dance
description: Kill 150 Enemies with a Melee Weapon

name: Swordsman
description: Complete a Mission with only a Melee Weapon equipped

name: Thrill Rider
description: Kill 20 Enemies while riding a K-Drive, Kaithe, Velocipod, or Merulina

name: Topping Off the Tank
description: Successfully defend an Excavator without allowing it to run out of power

name: Two For One
description: Pierce and kill 2 or more enemies in a single Bow shot

name: Animator
description: Retrieve the Ayatan Statue for Maroo in Maroo's Bazaar

name: Cache Hunter
description: Find 6 caches across any Sabotage missions

name: Conservationist
description: Complete 3 different Perfect Animal Captures in Orb Vallis

name: Earth Bounty Hunter
description: Complete 3 different Bounties in the Plains of Eidolon

name: Earth Fisher
description: Catch 3 Rare Fish in the Plains of Eidolon

name: Earth Miner
description: Mine 3 Rare Gems or Ore in the Plains of Eidolon

name: Finely Tuned
description: Play 2 different Shawzin songs in Duviri

name: Flawless
description: Clear a Railjack Boarding Party without your Warframe taking damage

name: Forward Thinking
description: Destroy a Crewship with Forward Artillery

name: Friendly Fire
description: While piloting a hijacked Crewship, destroy 3 enemy Fighters

name: Good Friend
description: Help Clem with his weekly mission

name: Heavy Ordnance
description: Kill 500 enemies with an Arch Gun

name: I Decree
description: Collect 15 Decrees in a single Duviri session, or run of The Circuit

name: Invader
description: Complete 6 Invasion missions of any type

name: Loyalty
description: Gain 5,000 Standing with any one Syndicate faction

name: Night and Day
description: Collect 10 Vome or Fass Residue in the Cambion Drift

name: Now Boarding
description: Complete 3 different K-Drive races in Orb Vallis on Venus or in Cambion Drift on Deimos

name: Ollie Oop!
description: Play Ollie's Crash Course and complete a race

name: Polarized
description: Polarize with Forma 1 time (not in Simulacrum)

name: Sound Sleeper
description: Complete 3 Nightmare missions of any type

name: The Old Ways
description: Complete 1 mission with only a single pistol and a glaive equipped

name: Tusk Thumpin'
description: Kill a Tusk Thumper in the Plains of Eidolon

name: Vault Looter
description: Unlock 4 Dragon Key vaults on Deimos

name: Vault Raider
description: Complete an Isolation Vault Bounty Mission in the Cambion Drift on Deimos

name: Venus Bounty Hunter
description: Complete 3 different bounties in the Orb Vallis

name: Venus Fisher
description: Catch 3 Rare Servofish in the Orb Vallis

name: Venus Miner
description: Mine 3 Rare Gems or Ore in the Orb Vallis

name: Zariman Bounty Hunter
description: Complete 4 different Bounties in the Zariman

name: Antiquarian
description: Open one of each era/tier of Relic (Lith, Meso, Neo, Axi)

name: Ascendant
description: Complete 4 Halls of Ascension on Lua

name: Ceremonial Evolution
description: Evolve any Incarnon weapon in-mission 5 times

name: Cold Steel
description: Kill 1000 Enemies on The Steel Path

name: Day Trader
description: Win 3 wagers in a row without letting the enemy score in one match of The Index

name: Defense
description: Complete a Defense mission reaching at least wave 12

name: Elite Beast Slayer
description: Defeat the Orowyrm in Steel Path

name: Elite Test Subject
description: Complete 8 Zones of Elite Sanctuary Onslaught

name: Fallen Angel
description: Defeat 5 Void Angels in the Zariman

name: Hold Your Breath
description: Survive for over 20 minutes in Kuva Survival

name: Hydrolyst Hunter
description: Kill or Capture an Eidolon Hydrolyst

name: Night Terror
description: Complete 5 Nightmare missions of any type

name: Rise of the Machine
description: Kill 300 enemies using a Necramech without getting destroyed

name: Speedster
description: Finish a Capture mission in less than 90 seconds

name: Survival
description: Complete a Survival mission reaching at least 20 minutes
